settings.text: This is our repository of templates and guides used for various products and programs we offer. Click the corresponding links to access the written or video versions.

settings.title: Custom Playmat Guides
settings.description: Various guides that explain how to properly format artwork for upload, and how to add a custom mat to your cart.
settings.resource_1_title: Preparing Artwork For Custom Playmat Printing
settings.resource_1_description: Learn how to format and submit your images for the best results.
settings.resource_2_description: Interested in our Artist Program? Download our checklist to ensure you prep your files correctly.
settings.resource_3_title: Using Our Image Upload Tool Desktop/Web
settings.resource_3_description: If you're uploading artwork for a custom playmat, check out our tutorial on how to properly upload, crop, and submit it using your PC's web browser.
settings.resource_4_title: Using Our Image Upload Tool Mobile/Tablet
settings.resource_4_description: If you're uploading artwork for a custom playmat, check out our tutorial on how to properly upload, crop, and submit it using your mobile phone/tablet.
settings.resource_5_title: Using Our Image Upload Tool Mobile/Tablet
settings.resource_5_description: A short video on how to upload your art from a phone or tablet.
settings.resource_6_title: Using Our Image Upload Tool Desktop/Web
settings.resource_6_description: A short video on how to upload your art from your desktop's web browser.

settings.title: Custom Playmat Templates
settings.description: Here you'll find templates for sizing, measuring, and confirming your artwork is ready for printing.
settings.resource_1_description: A template for our standard Ovation mat, measuring 24" x 14", or 600 x 350 mm. PSD, PNG, and JPG included.
settings.resource_2_description: A template for our standard Triumph mat, measuring 28" x 14", or 700 x 350 mm. PSD, PNG, and JPG included.

settings.title: Artist Program Documentation
settings.description: All documentation regarding our artist program, including submission guidelines and terms.
settings.resource_1_description: Interested in our Artist Program? Download our checklist to ensure you prep your files correctly.
settings.resource_2_description: By submitting your artwork, you agree to the following terms. This summary is designed to be easy to understand.
